jobs.task: Send Angel a brief status update on the Investor Outreach project progress. Check projects/investor-outreach/README.md for current state. Keep it short — what's done, what's in progress, any blockers. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: */30 * * * *

jobs.task: Remind Angel to follow up with EUNO (Justin Tibble & Roshani Gami). They were sent a Hubble follow-up email on March 20. Check if they signed up for Ready to Raise or booked another Hubble session. If not, nudge them. Send reminder via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 14 3 4 *

jobs.task: Remind Angel: Send Kiyan the P1 list of LA-based investors for Needle outreach. Filter the Needle Active list for LA/Southern California investors marked P1. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 14 24 3 *

jobs.task: Remind Angel: Reach out to Psymed Ventures in earls and update Mati on progress. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 14 24 3 *

jobs.task: Remind Angel: Send Brock Blomberg (brock@ciis.edu), Michael Pinto (MPINTO@aol.com), and Evan Rutter (erutter@ciis.edu) at CIIS the list of fundraising/donor prospects for their approval before reaching out. The list is at projects/investor-outreach/ciis-donor-targets-v2.csv. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 14 24 3 *

jobs.task: Remind Angel: Log into DealCloud to update it. Also send Gary, Mike, and Brewer an update at Nfluence Partners. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 15 24 3 *

jobs.task: Remind Angel: Send Simon and Nathalie at CountryLine the pre-call email + 100-investor sheet before Monday's call. The note is at projects/countryline/note-to-simon-nathalie.md and the investor sheet is at projects/countryline/countryline-investors-100-updated.csv. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 20 0 21 3 *

jobs.task: Quick health check-in with Angel. Ask: 🚶‍♀️ How many steps today? (Goal: 10,000) 💧 How much water? (Goal: 80oz / 10 glasses). Keep it to 1-2 sentences. If morning: encourage starting strong. If afternoon: give progress encouragement. If evening: encourage hitting the goal. Be warm, not preachy. Send via Telegram.
jobs.name: Cron: 0 9-23 * * *
